meaning: Blessing/gratitude
Gulf praise
Very nice honestly (Gulf intensifier)
Truly not good this thing (Gulf negation)
It's okay but not nice (understatement)

text: ما شاء الله عليك يا حظك
meaning: God has willed it, how lucky you are
Let's see what happens
May God guide you (mild disapproval)
Blessed by God (religious praise)
What is this situation, oh Lord (exasperation)

text: This is amazing والله ما توقعت
meaning: This is amazing, I swear I didn't expect it
This place is so overrated honestly

text: Not bad بس مو best option يعني
meaning: Not bad but not the best option

text: I love هالمطعم the food is وايد amazing
meaning: I love this restaurant the food is very amazing

text: Terrible service والله ما انصح ابدا never again
meaning: Terrible service, I swear I don't recommend it ever, never again

text: The new update خرب كل شي everything is broken
meaning: The new update ruined everything, everything is broken

text: Pretty good بس يبي improvement شوي
meaning: Pretty good but needs a little improvement

text: Honestly صدق this place deserves all the hype يستاهل
meaning: Honestly this place deserves all the hype, it's worth it

text: So disappointed مع هالخدمه worst experience
meaning: So disappointed with this service, worst experience

text: هل anyone tried this يعرف if it's worth it
meaning: Has anyone tried this, does anyone know if it's worth it
May God help you with this work (implies difficulty)

text: تبارك الله شو هالجمال يا سلام
meaning: God bless, what beauty, wow
Thanks for this terrible service (sarcastic)

text: والله احسن شي سويته ما قصرت
meaning: Best thing you've done, well done (sarcastic)
May God give you strength for the effort (genuine gratitude)
